analysis.root_cause: The agent failed to perform the horizontal reflection required to interpret the mirror image of the clock and then failed to perform the temporal arithmetic.
The agent failed to correctly read the time from the flipped clock image (it is 4:10, not 7:10) and subsequently performed incorrect arithmetic.
The agent incorrectly read the mirrored clock face. The hour hand is at 4 and the minute hand is at 10, meaning the time is 4:10, not 7:10.
The agent misread the mirrored clock face even after flipping it. In the flipped image, the hour hand is at 4 and the minute hand is at 10, meaning 4:50, not 7:10.
